task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris main menu or application window is visible on the screen.
The 'Canal Lock' activity interface is visible, displaying a boat, a canal, and a lock system.

task_completion.description: Operate the lock mechanism to change water levels
task_completion.visual_evidence: The water level inside the lock has changed, or the lock gates/valves are shown in an open or active state compared to the initial state.

task_completion.description: Guide the boat to the other side to complete the level
task_completion.visual_evidence: The boat has successfully moved from one side of the lock to the other, or a level completion indicator (such as a success animation, stars, or prompt for the next level) is displayed.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the completed state
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot tool, terminal command, or file manager is visible indicating that an image file was saved to '/home/ga/canal_lock_complete.png'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GCompris application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GCompris application running natively in the Ubuntu environment, not a web browser searching for images or videos of the game.

integrity.description: The agent actively played the level rather than downloading a completed image
integrity.visual_evidence: Multiple screenshots show intermediate states of the lock mechanism being operated and the boat moving, rather than just a sudden appearance of the completed state.

integrity.description: The saved screenshot contains the actual game state
integrity.visual_evidence: The image saved to '/home/ga/canal_lock_complete.png' depicts the completed state of the Canal Lock activity, not a blank screen, text file, or unrelated content.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected screenshot must be saved to the exact path '/home/ga/canal_lock_complete.png'. The activity is 'Canal Lock' within the GCompris educational suite, which features a boat, a canal with varying water levels, and a lock system.
